news.headline: Brazil’s Finance Chief attributes Lula’s decreasing support to global issues.

Consumer inflation expectations have spiked, making it harder for the Fed to cut interest rates. University of Michigan reports inflation expectations at 4.9% in March and long-term expectations at 3.9%. Rising concerns over structurally persistent inflation.
news.summary: Consumer inflation expectations have surged, with the University of Michigan's Survey of Consumers showing a rise to 4.9% in March from 4.3% in February for year-ahead inflation forecasts. Longer-term expectations spiked to 3.9%, the highest since 1993. These numbers indicate a potentially more persistent inflation trend, impacting the Federal Reserve's ability to reduce interest rates further. Goldman Sachs' Elsie Peng emphasized caution in response to this data, as elevated inflation expectations can lead to self-fulfilling prophecies. This spike in inflation expectations adds uncertainty to the possibility of interest rate cuts this year. CFOs are increasingly worried about tariffs as well.

news.headline: Spirited Paw® debuts Calm supplement for cats & dogs to alleviate stress; features ingredients for relief.
news.summary: Introducing a new calming supplement for pets called Calm by Spirited Paw®, created by Standard Process®. This product is designed to help dogs and cats cope with stressful situations. With ingredients proven to provide relief from occasional stress, Palmyra, Wisconsin, March 28, 2025 – Spirited Paw® aims to support pet's well-being.

news.headline: School meals to promote farming improvements on a global scale, transforming food systems.
March sees a decline in consumer sentiment, reaching its lowest point since late 2022.

Advance Auto Parts aims to open 130+ new stores by 2027 after closure phase completion. Over 75% of current stores hold top positions in key markets. Company plans to open 30 new U.S. locations in 2025 and at least 100 more through 2027.
news.summary: Advance Auto Parts Inc. (NYSE:AAP) has successfully concluded the store closure phase of its transformation strategy and is now focusing on returning to growth. Currently, more than 75% of the company's stores are located in markets where it holds the top two positions in terms of store density, consolidating its presence in crucial areas. Moving forward, the company aims to open 30 new U.S. locations by 2025 and a minimum of 100 additional stores by 2027, including larger "market hubs." This strategic shift marks a significant step for Advance Auto Parts Inc. as it progresses towards expanding its footprint in the retail sector.

news.headline: Candiac Toyota wins Toyota's 2024 President’s Award for outstanding customer service; GM Sébastien Boisvert credits team's dedication.
news.summary: Candiac Toyota in Montréal has been awarded Toyota’s 2024 President’s Program for their exceptional performance in customer service. General Manager Sébastien Boisvert highlighted their commitment to quality service, whether for vehicle purchases or maintenance visits. The dealership's team was honored with the prestigious award for their dedication to customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Investors in Sana Biotechnology with losses over $50,000 between Mar 17, 2023, and Nov 4, 2024, urged to contact for legal options.
news.summary: Suffered losses surpassing $50,000 in Sana from March 17, 2023, to November 4, 2024? Get in touch with James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, to explore your next steps.

news.headline: TensorOpera AI and Samsung Electronics exhibit generative AI on mobile devices at CES 2025, powered by Exynos processors. Milestone in AI and mobile technology advancement.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, TensorOpera AI and Samsung Electronics unveiled a groundbreaking partnership at the Consumer Electronics Show (CES) 2025 in Las Vegas. Their collaboration showcased the capabilities of running multi-modal generative AI applications on Samsung Exynos processors within mobile devices. This advancement signifies a pivotal moment in leveraging mobile technology to propel artificial intelligence forward. The demonstration highlighted the potential of this integration.

news.headline: House Financial Services Committee becoming hub for GOP ambition, impacting party's slim House majority.
news.summary: The House Financial Services Committee is becoming a focal point for Republican aspirations and could serve as a critical juncture for the GOP's slim majority in the House.

news.headline: Satellogic completes transition to U.S. jurisdiction to enhance market presence and attract more investors.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that global carbon dioxide levels have reached a record high of 416 parts per million (ppm) in 2019. This increase is mainly attributed to human activities, particularly the burning of fossil fuels. Scientists warn that this surge in CO2 levels is accelerating climate change and its detrimental effects on the planet. The data also shows that the rate of increase has been consistent over the past decade, with an average rise of 2.5 ppm per year. This concerning trend highlights the urgent need for nations to take decisive actions to mitigate greenhouse gas emissions and curb global warming.

news.headline: HKMA warns on fake OCBC Bank site in Hong Kong; public urged to stay cautious.
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority recently cautioned the public about a deceitful website pretending to be OCBC Bank (Hong Kong) Limited. Citizens are urged to stay cautious to protect their financial information.

news.headline: Dow Jones increases after economic data; Nvidia and Tesla decline, GameStop rises due to Bitcoin move.
news.summary: Yesterday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following the release of positive economic data. While tech giants Nvidia and Tesla saw a decline in their stock prices, GameStop witnessed a significant surge in response to news related to bitcoin. This caused a fluctuation in the stock market, with the Dow Jones performing well overall. This information was reported on Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of March 28, 2025, the market for Virtual Dressing Room for eCommerce is categorized into three types: Hardware, Software, and Services, and segmented by application into Apparel, Eyewear, and Jewelry & Watches. The global market value for Virtual Dressing Room for eCommerce was approximated to be USD [insert amount]...

news.headline: Metagenomics market set to reach $6.71B by 2031, growing at 15.6% CAGR from 2024 due to sequencing tech advancements.
news.summary: The market is experiencing growth due to advancements in sequencing technologies and increased applications in microbiome research. In Redding, California, on March 28, 2025, a market research report titled "Metagenomics Market Size, Share, Forecast, & Trends Analysis by Technology" was released. The report highlights significant growth driven by developments in sequencing technologies. The expanding applications in microbiome research have also contributed to this growth. The report provides insights into the market size, share, forecast, and trends analysis, indicating a positive trajectory for the industry.

news.headline: By 2032, the Data Center Liquid Cooling Market is projected to reach $21.14 billion - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Data Center Liquid Cooling Market was released. The report covers various aspects including components such as solutions and services, end users like colocation providers, enterprises, and hyperscale data centers. It looks into cooling mediums, data center types, types of cooling, enterprises, and regions. The market analysis focuses on key numbers and trends within the industry, without specifying specific figures.

news.headline: Avalanche, Gelato team up for enterprise chains. New service streamlines deployment, lowers costs. Avalanche TVL over $1.1B. Crypto industry ready for institutional adoption crucial. Prominent brands adopt Gelato’s platform.
news.summary: Gelato, a popular blockchain developer platform, is launching a new blockchain-as-a-service solution on Avalanche to cater to the rising demand for sovereign blockchain infrastructure amid institutional adoption. This upgrade will assist developers in deploying fully sovereign chains faster and cheaper with full interoperability via Avalanche InterChain Messaging (ICM). Gelato's services are ideal for advanced applications such as fintech and specialized gaming economies, offering companies the ability to quickly deploy independent blockchains with reduced costs and quicker launch times. Avalanche, the 10th largest blockchain network in the industry, holds over $1.1 billion in total value locked (TVL) across its DeFi applications. The launch of this new solution aligns with the growing need for reliable infrastructure in order to fuel institutional crypto adoption. Gelato's founder, Luis Schliesske, highlighted the importance of robust infrastructure for institutions to have confidence in adopting blockchain technology and crypto offerings. Notable brands like Fox News and eBay have already utilized Gelato's development platform for blockchain-based solutions, showcasing its credibility in the industry.

news.headline: Alchip Technologies achieves record financials in 2024 with new highs for Revenue, Operating Income, Net Income, and EPS.
news.summary: Record levels were achieved in the latest financial report, with revenue hitting an all-time high of $X, operating income reaching $Y, net income also setting a new record at $Z, and earnings per share (EPS) reaching a peak. This strong performance reflects growing profitability and efficiency in the company's operations.

news.headline: Molecure progresses key clinical projects in 2024, focusing on advancing OATD-01 and OATD-02 programs.
news.summary: In 2024, Molecure made significant progress in advancing its novel therapies and aims to expedite its research and development in its leading clinical projects, OATD-01 and OATD-02. Here are the main highlights of the year:1. Molecure accomplished key milestones in the advancement of its innovative treatments.2. The company intends to fast-track its ongoing research and development efforts in its most advanced clinical programs, OATD-01 and OATD-02.3. The focus for the year was on accelerating the progress of the aforementioned clinical projects, indicating a strong commitment to furthering medical advancements.4. The achievements in 2024 demonstrate the company's dedication to pushing boundaries in the field of healthcare and its commitment to improving patient outcomes.5. With a promising outlook, Molecure is poised to continue making strides in the development of cutting-edge therapies for various medical conditions.

news.headline: Subaru and Gifts for Good partner in national program to support nonprofit causes, channeling customer incentives.
news.summary: A groundbreaking collaboration has been unveiled between Subaru of America, Inc. and Gifts for Good®, aimed at directing customer incentives towards impactful social and environmental organizations. This national program, announced on March 28, 2025 in Camden, N.J., marks a pioneering initiative in the realm of corporate social responsibility. The partnership seeks to harness the power of consumer incentives to drive support towards organizations making a real difference in communities. By leveraging this unique alliance, both entities are poised to make a significant impact, with far-reaching implications for social and environmental causes across the country.

news.headline: Stolt-Nielsen Limited to present first quarter 2025 results in virtual conference on April 3 at 15:00 CEST.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) announced they will be conducting a virtual presentation to talk about the Company's unaudited performance for Q1 2025. This presentation is scheduled for Thursday, April 3, 2025, at 15:00 CEST (09:00 EDT, 14:00 BST).

news.headline: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Pliant Therapeutics. Encouraging those who suffered significant losses to contact Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson to discuss their options.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Pliant Therapeutics to reach out to him. If you have suffered significant losses in Pliant Therapeutics stock or options, contact him directly to explore your potential options.

news.headline: ADM reported 22.4 million passengers in 2024 at YUL Airport, up 5.8% from 2023. EBITDA was $439.1 million, revenue $917.2 million, and net income $182.0 million. Operating expenses were $331.3 million, with transfers to govt of $146.8 million. Net debt was $2.21 billion.
news.summary: In 2024, ADM Aéroports de Montréal reported positive results and growth in key areas. YUL Montréal-Trudeau International Airport saw 5.1 million passengers in the fourth quarter, up 2.4% from 2023, and 22.4 million passengers in total, a 5.8% increase. EBITDA for 2024 was $439.1 million, up $1.2 million from the previous year. Capital investments were $456.5 million, up 39.6% from 2023. Consolidated revenues reached $917.2 million, an 8.2% increase. Net income was $182.0 million, up 36.9% from 2023. ADM's net debt as of December 31, 2024, was $2.21 billion. The company is focused on enhancing passenger experience with the Flight Plan 2028 initiative, starting construction this summer.

news.headline: Crypto Content Creator Campus to launch pilot edition in Bali from April 10-13, 2025, sponsored by Bybit, marking CCCC's debut in Asia Pacific.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on March 28, 2025, the Crypto Content Creator Campus (CCCC) announced the upcoming launch of a pilot edition in Bali from April 10 to 13, 2025. Sponsored by Bybit, the event will be CCCC's first in Asia Pacific and focus on the theme "Build Crypto."

news.headline: Holland America Line to start Alaska season on April 26, 6 ships to explore until Sept 2025. Exciting itinerary awaits.
news.summary: Alaska is prepared for the start of its cruise season as the first ship is set to depart on April 26. From this date through September 2025, a total of six ships will be exploring the beauty of Alaska through cruises and Cruisetours. Leading the way is Holland America Line, renowned for its Alaska cruising experiences. The season launch on April 26 marks the beginning of an exciting adventure as these six ships embark on journeys to explore the wonders of Alaska.

news.headline: Inventor from Perthamboy, N.J. creates E Z Lint Removal Device (NJD-2269) for laundry care, effectively removes lint and pet hair.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, an inventor from Perthamboy, New Jersey, shared their inspiration for creating a new laundry care appliance called the E Z LINT REMOVAL. The inventor aimed to develop a product that could efficiently eliminate lint, pet hair, and other debris from clothing. Their innovative design has shown promise in delivering improved results and is set to revolutionize the laundry care industry.

news.headline: Reply and AWS collaborate on Generative AI, aiming to enhance innovation and scalable AI apps. PRNewswire, March 28, 2025.
news.summary: A recent partnership aims to advance Generative AI solutions in various sectors by combining Reply's AI proficiency with AWS services. The collaboration was unveiled in Chicago on March 28, 2025. Reply, known for its expertise in systems integration and consulting, is a key player in this initiative.

news.headline: Alkami research finds banks need better fraud prevention; consumers prioritize data protection in digital banking.
news.summary: Research indicates that banks and credit unions must improve their prevention tactics as consumers demand better data security in their online banking services. This advice comes after a recent study conducted in Plano, Texas on March 28, 2025. Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT), a reputable provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions, highlights the urgency of this issue in light of increasing cyber threats.

news.headline: American Idol Season 22 Runner-Up Will Moseley releases new single "Mechanic" today; song about love power.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on March 28, 2025, Will Moseley, the Runner-Up of American Idol Season 22, unveiled his latest track "Mechanic" under the label 19 Recordings / 19 Entertainment. This heartfelt song, co-written by Moseley along with Kaylin Robinson and Jaron, explores the theme of a woman's love mending a broken man.

news.summary: On March 28, 2025, FallTech, a top provider of cutting-edge fall protection solutions, revealed the release of the FT-R+, a significant leap forward in self-retracting lifeline (SRL) technology. The FT-R+ introduces the innovative SpeedLine™ system, setting it apart from the rest in the industry.

Family files $50M lawsuit against Robinson Helicopter Company following death of former CEO and son in Quebec crash. Pl claim 'unacceptable negligence'.
news.summary: The executor of former Savoura CEO Stéphane Roy's estate, Daniel Roy, has revealed the filing of a $50 million lawsuit against Robinson Helicopter Company, Inc. The lawsuit stems from a fatal helicopter accident and allegedly points to "unacceptable negligence" on the part of the company. The plaintiffs are seeking compensation for the damages caused by the incident.

news.headline: Harvard Kennedy School case study highlights Target ALS and Dan Doctoroff's impactful approach to collaborative medical research.
news.summary: Renowned New York-based leader and former Deputy Mayor, Dan Doctoroff, is being acknowledged for his effective strategy in addressing ALS. The Harvard Kennedy School is set to debut a case study titled "Dan Doctoroff and the Power of Collaboration," highlighting his impactful approach. This recognition comes as Doctoroff's innovative methods have shown promising results in the field. The premiere of the case study will take place on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: Birkenstock opens new concept store in historic Zhangyuan, Shanghai on March 27th, marking a new chapter.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Linz am Rhein, Germany and Shanghai, a well-known German footwear brand, BIRKENSTOCK, revealed its Zhangyuan Concept Store to the public. This store, initially launched as a pop-up, has now become a permanent establishment in one of the cities. BIRKENSTOCK, famous for creating the footbed, has taken this step to further solidify its presence and cater to its customers in the region.

news.summary: On March 28, 2025, First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. news.headline: WealthManagement.com released 2025 RIA Edge 100 list recognizing top RIA firms; highlighting those growing strategically.
news.summary: Announced today by WealthManagement.com, the 2025 RIA Edge 100 list recognizes the top registered investment advisory (RIA) firms in the industry. As the premier digital resource for financial advisors and wealth management professionals, WealthManagement.com celebrates the achievements of these firms on an annual basis. This year's list showcases the top performing RIAs that have excelled in various aspects of financial advisory services.

news.headline: March 28, 2025: TR-1 form notifies major holdings in Reykjavík company.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Reykjavík, a report under TR-1 regulation was issued regarding the disclosure of significant holdings. The TR-1 form is the standard notification for declaring large ownership stakes in a company. This regulatory announcement indicates that a shareholder or entity holds a significant portion of shares in a particular company. It is a key disclosure document that provides information on major ownership positions, as required by regulations. This notice is vital for investors and regulatory authorities to track changes in ownership and shareholder influence within companies.

news.headline: Minerals Technologies Inc. will report Q1 2025 results on April 24 after market close, with a conference call on April 25 at 11am ET.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) revealed plans to report its Q1 results ending March 30, 2025, on April 24, 2025, after markets close. The company will conduct a conference call on April 25, 2025, at 11 a.m. ET to review these findings.

news.summary: The merger of Siem Investments S.à r.l., which owned 43,327,467 shares in Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA, representing 33.08% of shares and votes, occurred on 28 March 2025 when it was integrated into Momentum S.à r.l.

Colony Grill is the official pizza partner of Tampa Bay Rays for 2025-2028, serving thin-crust pizza at George M. Steinbrenner Field.
news.summary: In Tampa, starting March 28, 2025, baseball enthusiasts will have the opportunity to savor Colony Grill's renowned thin-crust pizza on game days as part of a fresh four-year collaboration. The partnership designates Colony Grill as the Official Pizza of the Tampa Bay Rays. The delectable pizza will be available at George M. Steinbrenner Field during the specified period.

news.headline: FDA approves first home test for Chlamydia, Gonorrhea, and Trichomoniasis. Opens 510(k) pathway for STI home tests.
news.summary: In a significant development, Visby Medical has been granted marketing authorization by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration in Silver Spring, Maryland on March 28, 2025. This approval not only paves the way for the Visby Medical Women's Sexual test but also opens the 510(k) Pathway for additional home tests aimed at detecting sexually transmitted infections. This decision marks a crucial step forward in enhancing access to important health screenings and empowering individuals to take control of their sexual health.
